commands.command: re-review please. i pushed the endpoint repair in `a830104dbcb0d1a59439f788358561c4d67f1667`: - `readmatrixmessages({ threadid })` now calls the spec/repo-consistent v1 relations path: `get /_matrix/client/v1/rooms/{roomid}/relations/{threadrootid}/m.thread/m.room.message` - the focused matrix test now asserts the v1 path, including encoded room and thread ids. local validation after the fix: ```text node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-matrix.config.ts extensions/matrix/src/actions.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/room-history.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.test.ts test files 4 passed (4) tests 72 passed (72) ``` ```text node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsbuildinfofile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/matrix-thread-pr-20260508-v1endpoint-rerun.tsbuildinfo # passed ``` ```text git diff --check node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/room-history.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send/formatting.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/room-history.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.test.ts docs/channels/matrix.md changelog.md all matched files use the correct format. ``` real behavior proof from a live matrix setup, redacted: # matrix thread real behavior proof (redacted) - captured_at_utc: `2026-05-08t15:09:36z` - pr_head: `a830104dbcb0d1a59439f788358561c4d67f1667` - runtime_account_hash: `e51963bdfce8` - homeserver_hash: `74c7bd2b1a2b` - room_hash: `de93997593a0` - source: karabo openclaw runtime matrix credentials from the running docker container; tokens and raw room/event ids intentionally omitted ## live matrix actions created a temporary private matrix room, sent one main-room message, two thread roots, and one thread reply under each root. - main: event_hash=`c467eefac1fc` - thread-a-root: event_hash=`dd6d0f5f7e06` - thread-a-reply: event_hash=`7334fb097f47` - thread-b-root: event_hash=`2048eafc98c7` - thread-b-reply: event_hash=`0a3554f749b5` ## v1 relations endpoint the proof queried the matrix client-server v1 relations path used by this pr: ```text get /_matrix/client/v1/rooms/{roomid}/relations/{threadrootid}/m.thread/m.room.message?dir=f&limit=20 ``` - thread a relation event hashes: `['7334fb097f47']` - thread b relation event hashes: `['0a3554f749b5']` - thread a isolated from thread b: `true` - thread b isolated from thread a: `true` ## reply placement shape fetched the live matrix reply events and inspected `content["m.relates_to"]`. - thread a relation keys: `['event_id', 'rel_type']` - thread a has is_falling_back: `false` - thread a has m.in_reply_to: `false` - thread a relation shape valid: `true` - thread b relation keys: `['event_id', 'rel_type']` - thread b has is_falling_back: `false` - thread b has m.in_reply_to: `false` - thread b relation shape valid: `true` ## result - live v1 thread reads isolated: `true` - live thread reply placement avoids fallback metadata: `true` - cleanup: `left temporary proof room` overall_real_behavior_proof_passed: `true` this covers the requested live synapse/matrix proof for the v1 relations endpoint, isolated native thread reads, and reply placement without fallback metadata.
commands.freeform_prompt: re-review please. I pushed the endpoint repair in `a830104dbcb0d1a59439f788358561c4d67f1667`: - `readMatrixMessages({ threadId })` now calls the spec/repo-consistent v1 relations path: `GET /_matrix/client/v1/rooms/{roomId}/relations/{threadRootId}/m.thread/m.room.message` - the focused Matrix test now asserts the v1 path, including encoded room and thread IDs. Local validation after the fix: ```text node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-matrix.config.ts extensions/matrix/src/actions.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/room-history.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.test.ts Test Files 4 passed (4) Tests 72 passed (72) ``` ```text node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/matrix-thread-pr-20260508-v1endpoint-rerun.tsbuildinfo # passed ``` ```text git diff --check node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/room-history.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send/formatting.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/room-history.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.test.ts docs/channels/matrix.md CHANGELOG.md All matched files use the correct format. ``` Real behavior proof from a live Matrix setup, redacted: # Matrix Thread Real Behavior Proof (Redacted) - captured_at_utc: `2026-05-08T15:09:36Z` - pr_head: `a830104dbcb0d1a59439f788358561c4d67f1667` - runtime_account_hash: `e51963bdfce8` - homeserver_hash: `74c7bd2b1a2b` - room_hash: `de93997593a0` - source: Karabo OpenClaw runtime Matrix credentials from the running Docker container; tokens and raw room/event IDs intentionally omitted ## Live Matrix Actions Created a temporary private Matrix room, sent one main-room message, two thread roots, and one thread reply under each root. - main: event_hash=`c467eefac1fc` - thread-a-root: event_hash=`dd6d0f5f7e06` - thread-a-reply: event_hash=`7334fb097f47` - thread-b-root: event_hash=`2048eafc98c7` - thread-b-reply: event_hash=`0a3554f749b5` ## v1 Relations Endpoint The proof queried the Matrix Client-Server v1 relations path used by this PR: ```text GET /_matrix/client/v1/rooms/{roomId}/relations/{threadRootId}/m.thread/m.room.message?dir=f&limit=20 ``` - thread A relation event hashes: `['7334fb097f47']` - thread B relation event hashes: `['0a3554f749b5']` - thread A isolated from thread B: `True` - thread B isolated from thread A: `True` ## Reply Placement Shape Fetched the live Matrix reply events and inspected `content["m.relates_to"]`. - thread A relation keys: `['event_id', 'rel_type']` - thread A has is_falling_back: `False` - thread A has m.in_reply_to: `False` - thread A relation shape valid: `True` - thread B relation keys: `['event_id', 'rel_type']` - thread B has is_falling_back: `False` - thread B has m.in_reply_to: `False` - thread B relation shape valid: `True` ## Result - live v1 thread reads isolated: `True` - live thread reply placement avoids fallback metadata: `True` - cleanup: `left temporary proof room` overall_real_behavior_proof_passed: `True` This covers the requested live Synapse/Matrix proof for the v1 relations endpoint, isolated native thread reads, and reply placement without fallback metadata.
